title: Original Japanese Transcripts
wikitext:
[]: Original Japanese Transcripts             Quote Post by thefangirllogic » Thu Jan 18, 2024 8:48 pm Hello!! This is my first time posting on a forum anywhere but I am kinda desperate so I am taking a big step to find this. I am currently a uni student writing their final year dissertation and I am writing mine partially on Evangelion (weeb yes I know I ain't dismissing the allegations). I am learned in Japanese and would like to be able to use the original Japanese scripts alongside the original Japanese dub so I can comment on language use and setting description. I know Evangelion Originals exists but there is no existence of the scans available online and from the translated version I have seen, I am aware it misses out some parts, one part I am planning on analysing in fact which is depressing. I also know it was released with the BDs but I can't seem to find a reliable source to get it from so if anyone could help I would greatly appreciate it!!!! Technically this is overkill for my dissertation but eh reach for the stars ig (also I would just like to see them for curiosity sake as I am interested in Japanese voice acting as well :3) Thank you!!!!!!!

[]: Re: Original Japanese Transcripts             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Jan 19, 2024 4:56 am I have some friends who may be able to help you there; I'll be asking around.

[]: Re: Original Japanese Transcripts             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Tue Jul 23, 2024 2:13 pm Hello, thefangirllogic, Have you finally found the original Japanese scripts? How is your dissertation coming along after all these months? I hope you could sign in again and tell us about your project. It seems intriguing.

Article: Original Japanese Transcripts
[]: Original Japanese Transcripts             Quote Post by thefangirllogic » Thu Jan 18, 2024 8:48 pm Hello!! This is my first time posting on a forum anywhere but I am kinda desperate so I am taking a big step to find this. I am currently a uni student writing their final year dissertation and I am writing mine partially on Evangelion (weeb yes I know I ain't dismissing the allegations). I am learned in Japanese and would like to be able to use the original Japanese scripts alongside the original Japanese dub so I can comment on language use and setting description. I know Evangelion Originals exists but there is no existence of the scans available online and from the translated version I have seen, I am aware it misses out some parts, one part I am planning on analysing in fact which is depressing. I also know it was released with the BDs but I can't seem to find a reliable source to get it from so if anyone could help I would greatly appreciate it!!!! Technically this is overkill for my dissertation but eh reach for the stars ig (also I would just like to see them for curiosity sake as I am interested in Japanese voice acting as well :3) Thank you!!!!!!!
